root_text.an4.201:1.3: Taṁ suṇātha, sādhukaṁ manasi karotha, bhāsissāmī”ti.
root_text.an4.201:1.4: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ.
root_text.an4.201:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco pāṇātipātī hoti, adinnādāyī hoti, kāmesumicchācārī hoti, musāvādī hoti, surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhāyī hoti.
root_text.an4.201:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco attanā ca pāṇātipātī hoti, parañca pāṇātipāte samādapeti;
root_text.an4.201:3.3: attanā ca adinnādāyī hoti, parañca adinnādāne samādapeti;
root_text.an4.201:3.4: attanā ca kāmesumicchācārī hoti, parañca kāmesumicchācāre samādapeti;
root_text.an4.201:3.5: attanā ca musāvādī hoti, parañca musāvāde samādapeti;
root_text.an4.201:3.6: attanā ca surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhāyī hoti, parañca surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhāne samādapeti.
root_text.an4.201:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, adinnādānā paṭivirato hoti, kāmesumicchācārā paṭivirato hoti, musāvādā paṭivirato hoti, surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā paṭivirato hoti.
root_text.an4.201:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco attanā ca pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, parañca pāṇātipātā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.201:5.3: attanā ca adinnādānā paṭivirato hoti, parañca adinnādānā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.201:5.4: attanā ca kāmesumicchācārā paṭivirato hoti, parañca kāmesumicchācārā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.201:5.5: attanā ca musāvādā paṭivirato hoti, parañca musāvādā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.201:5.6: attanā ca surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā paṭivirato hoti, parañca surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā veramaṇiyā samādapeti.

translation_text.an4.201:1.1: “Mendicants, I will teach you an untrue person and an even more untrue person,
translation_text.an4.201:1.2: a true person and an even truer person.
translation_text.an4.201:1.3: Listen and apply your mind well, I will speak.”
translation_text.an4.201:2.2: It’s someone who kills living creatures, steals, commits sexual misconduct, lies, and consumes beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.an4.201:2.3: This is called an untrue person.
translation_text.an4.201:3.1: And what is an even more untrue person?
translation_text.an4.201:3.2: It’s someone who kills living creatures, steals, commits sexual misconduct, lies, and consumes beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants. And they encourage others to do these things.
translation_text.an4.201:3.7: This is called an even more untrue person.
translation_text.an4.201:4.1: And what is a true person?
translation_text.an4.201:4.2: It’s someone who doesn’t kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, lie, or consume beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.an4.201:4.3: This is called a true person.
translation_text.an4.201:5.1: And what is an even truer person?
translation_text.an4.201:5.2: It’s someone who doesn’t kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, lie, or consume beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants. And they encourage others to refrain from these things.
translation_text.an4.201:5.7: This is called an even truer person.”
